# $1 Wings For UFC 327 👊

**From:** "Dave & Buster’s" <Email@e.daveandbusters.com>
**Date:** Thu, 09 Apr 2026 14:34:46 -0600

Dave & Buster's





https://click.e.daveandbusters.com/?%3D%3D

https://click.e.daveandbusters.com/?%3D%3D 

APRIL 11 | UFC(R) 327


https://click.e.daveandbusters.com/?%3D%3D 

APRIL 12 | AEW DYNASTY


https://click.e.daveandbusters.com/?%3D%3D 

APRIL 18-19 | WRESTLEMANIA






Between the massive 40 ft. screens, 30+ HDTVs, and 150+ games, the numbers are always in your favor on Knockout Nights. And thanks to 1/2 off UFC Challenge plays and $1 Wings during UFC 327, they're looking even better this Saturday. Be there.


https://click.e.daveandbusters.com/?%3D%3D 
RESERVE YOUR SPOT 



https://click.e.daveandbusters.com/?%3D%3D 

A KNOCKOUT DUO
EAT & PLAY COMBO

 
Pair your gameplay with crave-worthy eats like our fan-favorite Dave’s Double Cheeseburger—available with the Eat & Play Combo, starting at just $19.99.

https://click.e.daveandbusters.com/?%3D%3D 
CHECK IT OUT








https://click.e.daveandbusters.com/?%3D%3D 

1/2 PRICE GAMES
SUN - THURS

 
Keep the fun going all week long with 1/2 Price Games Sunday - Thursday! Play more for less.

https://click.e.daveandbusters.com/?%3D%3D

 $1 Wings: Promotional. Limited time only. Valid at participating locations only. Offer valid only on 4/11. Get traditional and boneless wings for one dollar ($1) each with a choice of any of our sauces, rubs, or no sauce. First and subsequent wing orders must occur 10 at a time. Each order includes 10 traditional or boneless wings and one (1) side of ranch or bleu cheese. Offer includes one (1) choice of sauce or rub per order; cannot mix wing sauce or rub in the same order. Cannot mix traditional and boneless in the same order. Hours may change by location. Promotional price starts at $1 per wing/ per person, and price may be subject to increase at any time. Prices may vary by location. Offer may be revised or rescinded at any time. Not valid with any other promotion. Dine-in
 only. No take home bags. Other restrictions may apply. See stores for details. Void where prohibited.
 



 Eat & Play Combo: Promotional. Eat & Play Combo. Limited Time only. Get a Dave’s Double Cheeseburger, Fish & Chips, Boneless Wings, Crispy Chicken Sandwich, Classic Goldfingers or Parmesan Garlic Chicken Caesar Salad plus a $10 Power Card. Promotional price starts at $19.99 per person but varies by location. Price may be subject to change at any time. Substitutions available for additional cost. Unlimited gameplay upgrade is valid from time of first gameplay swipe to store closure on the same day. Offer includes a 30-second lag between each gameplay swipe. Tickets earned on redemption games are capped at 1,500. Not valid on purple swipe games (VR, crane games, pushers, dance games or merchandising games) or orange/blue swipe amusements (Human Crane, the Arena, and Social Bays). Valid one
 per person. Tax and gratuity not included. Not valid with any other promotion. Dine-in only. Restrictions apply. See store for details. Void where prohibited.
 





Half-Price Games Sun-Thurs: Promotional. Limited Time Only. Half Price Games. Offer valid in-store only. Valid only on Sundays through Thursdays for a limited time. In Atlanta, Lawrenceville, Wauwatosa, Manchester, Alpharetta, Auburn, Madison, Milford, McDonough, Bellevue, Lynnwood, and Green Bay locations, Half Price Games are valid every day for a limited time. Not valid on Virtual Reality or Human Crane games. Excludes photo booths. Game Play coupons may not be valid in combination with the Half Price Games offer on select days. Power Card activation fee may apply. Offer cannot be combined with other promotions. Additional restrictions may apply. Offer subject to change or cancellation at any time. Void where prohibited. See store for details. May not be applicable in all stores.





 Dave & Buster’s, Inc. 

1221 S Beltline Road Coppell, TX 75019 US
